A

AdminBrowseEventsActivity - Class in com.example.lottery
AdminBrowseEventsActivity serves as the administrator event browser, displaying a summary of all events.
AdminBrowseEventsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.AdminBrowseEventsActivity
 
AdminBrowseImagesActivity - Class in com.example.lottery
AdminBrowseImagesActivity serves as the administrator image browser, displaying all event posters.
AdminBrowseImagesActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.AdminBrowseImagesActivity
 
AdminBrowseLogsActivity - Class in com.example.lottery
Admin page for browsing all notification logs sent by organizers to entrants.
AdminBrowseLogsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.AdminBrowseLogsActivity
 
AdminBrowseProfilesActivity - Class in com.example.lottery
Allows administrators to browse all user profiles in the system.
AdminBrowseProfilesActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.AdminBrowseProfilesActivity
 
AdminEventDetailsActivity - Class in com.example.lottery
AdminEventDetailsActivity displays a read-only administrator view of a specific event.
AdminEventDetailsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.AdminEventDetailsActivity
 
AdminImageAdapter - Class in com.example.lottery
Adapter for displaying event poster images in the admin image browser.
AdminImageAdapter(List<Event>, AdminImageAdapter.OnImageClickListener) - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.AdminImageAdapter
Constructs a new AdminImageAdapter.
AdminImageAdapter.OnImageClickListener - Interface in com.example.lottery
Interface definition for a callback to be invoked when an image item is clicked.
AdminImageDetailsActivity - Class in com.example.lottery
AdminImageDetailsActivity displays a full-size poster preview for administrators.
AdminImageDetailsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.AdminImageDetailsActivity
 
AdminNavigationHelper - Class in com.example.lottery.util
Centralised helper that wires up the admin bottom-navigation bar (layout_bottom_nav_admin.xml) in every admin screen.
AdminNavigationHelper.AdminTab - Enum Class in com.example.lottery.util
The five tabs in the admin bottom-navigation bar.
AdminProfileActivity - Class in com.example.lottery
AdminProfileActivity displays the admin's profile and allows switching between entrant and organizer roles.
AdminProfileActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.AdminProfileActivity
 
AdminRoleManager - Class in com.example.lottery.util
Utility class to manage admin role switching state.
AdminRoleManager() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.util.AdminRoleManager

Admin authentication screen.

B

buildCancelledEntrantUpdate() - Static method in class com.example.lottery.util.InvitationFlowUtil
Builds a Firestore update payload for cancelling an entrant's participation.
buildEntrantStatusUpdateFromResponse(String) - Static method in class com.example.lottery.util.InvitationFlowUtil
Builds a Firestore update payload for an entrant status based on a notification response.
buildInvitedEntrantUpdate() - Static method in class com.example.lottery.util.InvitationFlowUtil
Builds a Firestore update payload for marking an entrant as invited.
buildNotSelectedEntrantUpdate() - Static method in class com.example.lottery.util.InvitationFlowUtil
Builds a Firestore update payload for marking an entrant as not selected.
buildReadNotificationUpdate() - Static method in class com.example.lottery.util.InvitationFlowUtil
Builds a Firestore update payload for marking a notification as read.
buildWaitlistJoinUpdate() - Static method in class com.example.lottery.util.InvitationFlowUtil
Builds a Firestore update payload for an entrant joining the waitlist after an invitation.

C

CancelledListAdapter - Class in com.example.lottery
Adapter for cancelled entrants RecyclerView to display a list of entrants that cancelled the specific event
CancelledListAdapter.ViewHolder - Class in com.example.lottery
stores and recycles views as they are scrolled off screen
cleanUpCoOrganizerRecords(FirebaseFirestore, String, Runnable) - Static method in class com.example.lottery.util.UserDeletionUtil
Batch-deletes all co-organizer records for the given user across every event, then invokes onDone.
clearAdminRoleSession(Context) - Static method in class com.example.lottery.util.AdminRoleManager
Clears the admin role session (call when logging out or returning to main admin).
clearCountsCache() - Method in class com.example.lottery.EventAdapter
Clears the cached waitingList counts so the next bind triggers a fresh fetch.
CO_ORGANIZERS - Static variable in class com.example.lottery.util.FirestorePaths

com.example.lottery.util - package com.example.lottery.util
 
Comment - Class in com.example.lottery.model
Model class representing a comment on an event.
Comment() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.model.Comment
Default constructor for Firestore serialization.
Comment(String, String, String, String, String, String, Timestamp, Timestamp, boolean) - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.model.Comment
Full constructor for a comment.
CommentAdapter - Class in com.example.lottery
RecyclerView adapter for displaying comments on an event, with optional delete support for organizers and admins.
CommentAdapter(List<Comment>, boolean, String) - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.CommentAdapter
Creates a new CommentAdapter.
CommentBottomSheet - Class in com.example.lottery
Bottom sheet dialog that displays a real-time comment thread for an event and allows entrants and organizers to post new comments.
CommentBottomSheet() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.CommentBottomSheet
 
COMMENTS - Static variable in class com.example.lottery.util.FirestorePaths
 
ConfirmationTicketGenerator - Class in com.example.lottery.util
Utility class responsible for generating styled confirmation ticket PDFs.

disableNavigation(Activity) - Static method in class com.example.lottery.util.EntrantNavigationHelper
Replaces all tab click listeners with no-ops.
disableNavigation(Activity) - Static method in class com.example.lottery.util.OrganizerNavigationHelper
Replaces all tab and FAB click listeners with no-ops.

Model class representing an entrant's participation record in an event's waiting list.

Default constructor for Firestore serialization.

Full constructor for an entrant-event relationship.

Listener interface used to notify when an event item is clicked.

Activity that displays detailed information about a specific event from an entrant's perspective.

Activity that displays the history of events an entrant has registered for.

Adapter for displaying the entrant's event registration history.

Data class that pairs an Event with the entrant's registration status and the organizer's display name.

Listener interface for handling clicks on history items.

Activity that displays the lottery guidelines and rules for entrants.

Initializes the activity, sets up the Toolbar with back navigation, configures the RecyclerView and adapter, and triggers event loading from Firestore.

OrganizerBrowseEventsActivity - Class in com.example.lottery
OrganizerBrowseEventsActivity serves as the organizer event browser, displaying a summary of published events.
OrganizerBrowseEventsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.OrganizerBrowseEventsActivity
 
OrganizerCreateEventActivity - Class in com.example.lottery
Activity for organizers to create or edit events.
OrganizerCreateEventActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.OrganizerCreateEventActivity
 
OrganizerEventDetailsActivity - Class in com.example.lottery
Activity to display the details of a specific event and handle registration.
OrganizerEventDetailsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.OrganizerEventDetailsActivity
 
OrganizerInviteCoOrganizerDialogFragment - Class in com.example.lottery
DialogFragment that lets an organizer search for users and assign them as co-organizers for a specific event.
OrganizerInviteCoOrganizerDialogFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.OrganizerInviteCoOrganizerDialogFragment
 
OrganizerInviteEntrantDialogFragment - Class in com.example.lottery
DialogFragment that lets an organizer search for entrants by name, email, or phone and directly invite them to an event's waiting list.
OrganizerInviteEntrantDialogFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.OrganizerInviteEntrantDialogFragment
 
OrganizerLotteryGuidelinesActivity - Class in com.example.lottery
Activity that displays the lottery guidelines and rules for organizers.
OrganizerLotteryGuidelinesActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.OrganizerLotteryGuidelinesActivity
 
organizerName - Variable in class com.example.lottery.EntrantHistoryAdapter.HistoryItem
 
OrganizerNavigationHelper - Class in com.example.lottery.util
Centralised helper that wires up the organizer bottom-navigation bar (layout_bottom_nav_organizer.xml) in every organizer screen.
OrganizerNavigationHelper.OrganizerTab - Enum Class in com.example.lottery.util
The four regular tabs in the organizer bottom-navigation bar.
OrganizerNotificationEventAdapter - Class in com.example.lottery
Adapter for displaying events in the Organizer Notifications screen.
OrganizerNotificationEventAdapter(List<Event>, OrganizerNotificationEventAdapter.OnNotificationGroupClickListener) - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.OrganizerNotificationEventAdapter
Constructs a new OrganizerNotificationEventAdapter.
OrganizerNotificationEventAdapter.OnNotificationGroupClickListener - Interface in com.example.lottery
Listener interface for handling clicks on notification group buttons.
OrganizerNotificationEventAdapter.ViewHolder - Class in com.example.lottery
ViewHolder class for caching UI component references in each list item.
OrganizerNotificationsActivity - Class in com.example.lottery
Activity that allows organizers to manage and send notifications to different groups of entrants.
OrganizerNotificationsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.OrganizerNotificationsActivity
 
OrganizerProfileActivity - Class in com.example.lottery
Activity class representing the profile screen for an organizer.
OrganizerProfileActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.OrganizerProfileActivity
 
OrganizerQrCodeDetailActivity - Class in com.example.lottery
Activity for displaying the large QR code for a specific event.
OrganizerQrCodeDetailActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.OrganizerQrCodeDetailActivity
 
OrganizerQrEventAdapter - Class in com.example.lottery
Adapter for displaying events in the QR code selection list.

Constructs a new OrganizerQrEventAdapter.
OrganizerQrEventAdapter.OnEventClickListener - Interface in com.example.lottery
Interface definition for a callback to be invoked when an event item is clicked.
OrganizerQrEventListActivity - Class in com.example.lottery
Activity that displays a list of events for the organizer to select and view their QR codes.

overrideTabWithoutFinish(Activity, AdminNavigationHelper.AdminTab, String) - Static method in class com.example.lottery.util.AdminNavigationHelper
Re-wires a single tab so it navigates to the target Activity without calling finish() on the source.

P

PosterImageLoader - Class in com.example.lottery.util
Centralizes poster image loading so screens can render either local URIs, remote download URLs, or Base64 encoded strings.

Checks for available capacity and promotes one waitlisted entrant if possible.

S

SampleFragment - Class in com.example.lottery
fragment for user to enter the number of invitations they want to send
SampleFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.SampleFragment
 
sampling(String) - Method in class com.example.lottery.EntrantsListActivity
implement US 02.05.02, randomly sample a specific number of signed up entrants from the attendees
sendNotification(String) - Method in class com.example.lottery.EntrantsListActivity
Sends a notification specifically to entrants on the waiting list (US 02.07.01) or to selected entrants (US 02.07.02).
sendNotification(String) - Method in interface com.example.lottery.NotificationFragment.NotificationListener
Called when the organizer clicks "Send" with the provided message content.
sendNotification(String) - Method in class com.example.lottery.OrganizerNotificationsActivity
Callback from NotificationFragment with the message content.
SessionUtil - Class in com.example.lottery.util
Utility for resolving the current user ID from Intent extras with a SharedPreferences fallback.

Packs this object into a Bundle for safe Fragment argument passing.

Updates the updatedAt timestamp.

Updates the updatedAt timestamp.

U

User - Class in com.example.lottery.model
Model class representing a user in the system.
User() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.model.User
Default constructor required for Firestore.
User(String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.model.User
Convenience constructor for basic profile information with userId.
User(String, String, String, String, String, String, GeoPoint, boolean, Timestamp, Timestamp, List<String>) - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.model.User
Full constructor.
UserDeletionUtil - Class in com.example.lottery.util
Utility for cleaning up user-related records before deleting a user document.
userDoc(String) - Static method in class com.example.lottery.util.FirestorePaths
Path: users/{userId}
userInbox(String) - Static method in class com.example.lottery.util.FirestorePaths
Path: users/{userId}/inbox
USERS - Static variable in class com.example.lottery.util.FirestorePaths

W

WaitedListedListAdapter - Class in com.example.lottery
Adapter for waited listed entrants RecyclerView to display a list of entrants that joined the specific event but not invited
WaitedListedListAdapter.ViewHolder - Class in com.example.lottery
stores and recycles views as they are scrolled off screen
WAITING_LIST - Static variable in class com.example.lottery.util.FirestorePaths
 
WaitingListActivity - Class in com.example.lottery
WaitingListActivity Displays the entrants who are currently in the waitlisted status for the selected event.
WaitingListActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.WaitingListActivity
 
WaitlistPromotionUtil - Class in com.example.lottery.util
Utility to handle automatic promotion of entrants from the waitlist when a spot opens up.
WaitlistPromotionUtil() - Constructor for class com.example.lottery.util.WaitlistPromotionUtil

All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values
